candidates.why: This appears to be a header/blank row with no visible amounts, while the actual populated operating D&A line is the next row.

This is the populated operating D&A line shown separately at the same level as Production costs and above Total expenses. That suggests D&A is not embedded in the selected COGS row 'Production costs' and should be added separately. In this oil and gas presentation, depletion/depreciation/amortization is most plausibly tied to production/cost of sales rather than SG&A.
This looks like a balancing/placeholder row with no visible amounts, not the operative D&A expense row to select.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit populated D&A line because it is presented separately from 'Production costs' in the operating section, implying it should be added separately to COGS rather than treated as already embedded.

candidates.why: Header/blank row only; no separate SG&A-specific D&A is visible here.

Although this is the populated operating D&A row, it is a single generic total line and is more plausibly production-side DD&A in this oil and gas statement. There is no explicit indication that it belongs to or should be separately added to the selected SG&A bucket.
Balancing/placeholder row with no visible amounts; not an actionable SG&A D&A line.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A- or R&D-specific D&A row is shown. To avoid double counting, the generic DD&A total is not also assigned to XSGA_DA.
